prompt: A bold anime pop-art poster of a tall white-haired male sorcerer in a dark navy high-collar coat, shown from the waist up, facing forward in a confident pose with his left hand raised close to the camera making a peace sign. His face is partially obscured by a rectangular blur/censor block centered over the eyes and nose area, while his spiky silver-white hair fans outward dramatically above a dark blindfold or visor. Place a huge comic speech bubble across the top with the exact text {argument name="headline text" default="LUDDITES ALWAYS LOSE!"} in heavy black all-caps sans-serif lettering. Use a vivid blue background filled with dense red and orange radial speed lines exploding outward from behind the character, creating a dynamic manga cover feel. Emphasize thick ink outlines, cel-shaded anime rendering, posterized contrast, and a slightly warped vintage-comic print look. The composition should be vertical, tightly cropped, high energy, rebellious, graphic, and meme-like, with the {argument name="character hair color" default="silver white"} hair, {argument name="coat color" default="dark navy"} coat, and {argument name="background color" default="bright blue with red-orange radial lines"} dominating the palette.
translatedPrompt: 一张醒目的动漫波普艺术海报，主角是一位身材高挑、留着白发的男性术士，身穿深海军蓝高领外套，半身像，正面对镜头，姿态自信，左手靠近镜头比出剪刀手。他的脸部被一个位于眼睛和鼻子区域的矩形模糊/遮挡块部分遮住，尖刺状的银白色头发在深色眼罩或护目镜上方戏剧性地向外散开。在顶部放置一个巨大的漫画对话气泡，其中包含确切文本 {argument name="headline text" default="LUDDITES ALWAYS LOSE!"}，使用粗重的黑色全大写无衬线字体。使用鲜艳的蓝色背景，背景中充满了从角色身后向外爆发的密集红色和橙色放射状速度线，营造出动态的漫画封面感。强调粗犷的墨水轮廓、赛璐珞风格的动漫渲染、海报化的对比度以及略微扭曲的复古漫画印刷外观。构图应为竖版、紧凑裁剪、充满活力、叛逆、图形化且具有模因感，并以 {argument name="character hair color" default="silver white"} 的头发、{argument name="coat color" default="dark navy"} 的外套和 {argument name="background color" default="bright blue with red-orange radial lines"} 的背景色为主色调。

breakdown.creativeCore: 动漫波普艺术抗议海报：此提示词可生成一张醒目的竖版动漫海报，画面包含面部被遮挡的角色、比出剪刀手势，以及用于模因艺术、社交媒体发帖或图形海报实验的超大标语气泡。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: anime, manga, vintage]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: camera]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
